text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her sights set on next year's Classic Triple
Crown, Rudolf is already training with even
greater intensity than before her debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While I understand her reasoning, I'd at least like
her to rest during her breaks...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, I see. That should be the last of the
equipment inquiries.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Looking over student requests. I asked my
vice-president to collate them.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Ever since we set up an online submission form,
we've been receiving more opinions than ever.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We will continue to maintain our physical
submissions box, of course, but the
administration has a responsibility to adapt our
methods to the times.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems pleased enough, but spending her
break time doing student council work can't be
good for her health.
choice_data_list: You should try and get some actual rest.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Your concern is appreciated, but I'm afraid this is
something of a constitutional defect of mine.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Without a job to do, I get so restless that I make
myself more exhausted.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Being a workaholic is in my nature. I'd appreciate
it if you could take that for what it is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to put my foot down when she phrases it
like that. As I'm wondering how to respond...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: President?! I knew it!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, Air Groove. Is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You're the matter. I was under the impression that you were training today.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: That's right. I told you this morning, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Indeed you did. Which is why I specifically
messaged you to say that you should look over
those requests in the evening.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And yet, for some reason, I got a message that
the job was already done. I thought it was
strange, so I dropped by the office, and what do I
find?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What can I say? I found myself free during my
break and thought I might as well start on it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You're free during break time because you're
supposed to be resting!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate your concern, but there's no need to
get so worked up.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Otherwise, how am I to introduce you to my
trainer as my calm and reliable right hand?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which, Trainer, allow me to introduce
you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: This is Air Groove, my vice-president.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She is a proud and noble compatriot who pursues
a dream very similar to my own.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Charmed, I'm sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(Air Groove, a racer also known as the Empress, is
a big name in Tracen Academy in her own right.)

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
This will be far from the last time you see each
other, so you may as well get to know one
another.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There's one other member of the student council
who I had hoped to introduce you to, but... all in
good time.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
That's all well and good, President. However,
we're not finished speaking.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am well aware of your inclination to do
everything yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All the same, I would appreciate it if you would at
least let me decide which tasks should take
priority.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
With the volume of requests we're receiving
lately, you can't possibly review them all and still
have time for your other obligations.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But that will do nothing but increase your own
workload.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Are you saying that I should offload my
responsibilities onto your shoulders?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I... No. Knowing you, you will find a solution on
your own.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad you understand. Now, don't worry about
me. Focus on the jobs I have assigned you.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Very well.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But for today, at least, you must set your duties
aside and focus on training.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Are we agreed?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: We are.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Good. Now, I ought to be going. My apologies
for the interruption.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
A veritable wunderkind, is she not? I count myself
lucky to work alongside someone so capable.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
And as such, I suppose I must pay heed to her
advice. I will focus on training for the rest of the
day.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Could you add more weights to the barbell,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I can still go higher. What's the point in training
without pushing myself to the limit?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm certainly going to feel that tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But when it comes to weight training, I try to... set
the bar high.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...That's rather good, is it not?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a thoroughly exhausting training session,
we're walking together around the academy
when...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Stop for a moment if you would, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm. I thought as much.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Brian! How is that assignment coming along?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Symboli Rudolf abruptly shouts up into the
branches of a nearby tree.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: ...Tch.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Rustle rustle...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An Umamusume leaps down from the tree!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: How did you know I was there?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I heard a faint noise from above as we
approached.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
There's only one person in Tracen Academy who
would try to hide from me in such an audacious
manner.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Ugh.... Nothing gets past you, huh? That's half
the reason I was hiding.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Haha. Come on, don't be so prickly.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, allow me to introduce you to Narita
Brian, the other student council member I
mentioned earlier. I suspect you might have heard
of her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
(I certainly have. Narita Brian is a racing
powerhouse on par with Air Groove.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: If that's all, then I'll be going.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Not so fast. You still haven't answered my
question. Have you finished the equipment
inspection?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll get to it. Speaking of which...

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
Dunno what it is, but that general manager kid's
got something on her mind.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: The general manager? I see. I'll speak to her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: See you 'round.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She might seem haughty at first, but she's much
more caring than she lets on. There are many jobs
that only she can do.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Still, the general manager... Hmmm.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Quite the opposite, actually. She only joined the
student council recently.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Apparently, I inspired her so much that she
wanted to join me in making a difference at the
academy.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
She's been struggling to get used to the work, so
the rest of us have been looking out for her.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
But her enthusiasm is quite enough on its own.
And having somebody on the council who looks
up to me pushes me to be better, too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My biggest accomplishment of the day ends up
being learning about Symboli Rudolf's relation
with the other members of the student council.
